_description: Volatile configuration for digitalocean-app-setup — doctl install commands, doctl subcommand templates, GitHub Action versions, default secret names. Re-read at invocation by SKILL.md Step 0.

githubAction._note: Action major version pinned to v2; bump here when upstream releases v3+

required.name: DIGITALOCEAN_ACCESS_TOKEN
required.description: Personal access token used by doctl and GitHub Actions

defaults._note: App Platform expects HTTP on port 8080 by default. Override via HTTP_PORT in the app spec or use $PORT.
